guide.title: Suno rikodin gayd
guide.subtitle: Aw f…Ē kapch…Ē v…Ēys …õn gita tek d…õn we kin g…õt di b…õst riz…Ēlt.
guide.intro: Suno de du di b…õst wit klin, unambiguous r…õfr…õns d…õn. Dis gayd de k…Ēba di pripiam…õnt, di target l…õv…õl, …õn wan 3‚Äď5 minit rikodin skript.

prep.title: F…Ē pripia
prep.body: Rik…Ēd na rum we d…õn d…Ēn trit …Ē wan we g…õt b…Ēku s…Ēft matirial (k…Ētin, rug, klos insay kloz). Off fans …õn …õnitin we de hum. Wom yu v…Ēys f…Ē 5 minit bifo yu r…õk…Ēd.

levels.title: Lev…õl d…õn: -12 to -6 dBFS
levels.body: Aim f…Ē pik bitwin -12 …õn -6 dBFS na di mita. We p…Ēsin de d…ĒŇč da say de, pipul d…õn kin notis di n…Ēys we de na di bakgr…Ēn m…Ē; oba am, di risk f…Ē klip de go …Ēp. Yuz di mita we de na di Rik…Ēd pej f…Ē s…õt yu geyn bifo yu bigin.

distance.title: Mik distans: 15‚Äď30 cm
distance.body: Stay 15 to 30 cm fr…Ēm di maykrofon. Klos pas dat de …õgzajarayt plosives …õn proksimiti if…õkt; fa fawe de pik op m…Ē rum rivab …õn n…Ēys.

script.title: Skript f…Ē rikodin
script.vowels: Vaybul d…õn we de k…Ēntinyu f…Ē de ‚ÄĒ a, e, i, o, u
script.excerpt: Wan pat pan siŇč (8 to 16 bar) .
script.dynamics: Dynamics: stat saf, d…Ēn lawd wan
script.spoken_phrase: Wan frayz we yu t…Ēk, so Suno go ebul f…Ē rid yu v…Ēkal t…Ēyn

expectations.title: Wetin Suno de …õksp…õkt
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, dray (n…Ē g…õt rivab …Ē if…õkt), 3 to 5 minit f…Ē r…õfr…õns. Di klin, m…Ēs rip…Ēt 2 minit f…Ē di tek kin prodyuz di b…õst riz…Ēlt.

suno_voice_full.name: Ful vokal skript f…Ē Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: 5 minit d…õn we d…õn gayd: wam-ap, vaybul, skel, tu siŇč d…õn we d…õn pul, dinamik, …õn wan frayz we d…õn t…Ēk.

step.warmup_inst: Luz am wit yawn, lip trill (brrr), …õn wan saf saf hum f…Ē l…õk wan minit. No nid f…Ē rikod…Ē ‚ÄĒ na j…Ēs f…Ē rilaks yu trot bifo yu siŇč.
step.vowels: Vaybul d…õn we de k…Ēntinyu f…Ē de
step.vowels_inst: Hol …õni vaybul ‚ÄĒ a, e, i, o, u ‚ÄĒ f…Ē 3 to 4 s…õk…Ēn na yu k…Ēmfyut pitch, wit wan stedi volyum. Dis de …õp Suno f…Ē pik di klin timbre f…Ē yu v…Ēys.
step.scales_inst: SiŇč wan simpul skel …Ēp …õn afta dat d…ĒŇč, pan "la" …Ē "na". I n…Ē nid f…Ē bi paf…õkt ‚ÄĒ di gol na f…Ē map yu vokal r…õnj.
step.section: S…Ēm pat pan di siŇč d…õn ‚ÄĒ pat 1
step.section_inst: SiŇč 8 to 16 bar d…õn na di siŇč, wit di rial tin we yu want f…Ē t…Ēk b…Ēt. Prioritiz klia …õn prez…õns pas t…õknikal paf…õkt.
step.section2: S…Ēm pat pan di siŇč d…õn ‚ÄĒ pat 2
step.section2_inst: SiŇč …Ēda 8 to 16 ba ‚ÄĒ i fayn f…Ē mek yu siŇč wan k…Ēr…õkt …Ē wan pat we difr…õn fr…Ēm di wan we bin de bifo. M…Ē difr…õn tin d…õn kin …õp di m…Ēdel f…Ē lan yu v…Ēys.
step.dynamics_inst: SiŇč di sem frayz stat rili saf …õn d…Ēn lawd wan, we yu n…Ē str…õch yu trot. Dis de sho Suno yu v…Ēys in dinamik r…õnj.
step.spoken_inst: T…Ēk ‚ÄĒ n…Ē siŇč ‚ÄĒ sh…Ēt, natura fr…õz, l…õk se yu de chat. Dis de …õp Suno f…Ē no di rial timbre f…Ē yu v…Ēys.
